summary: Verified Stripe status fix for NLYT SaaS. All 9 test cases (A-I) passed. The bug where participants showed 'Invité' instead of 'Garanti' after successful Stripe flow is now fixed.
passed_tests: A. Invitation page shows 'Garanti' badge for accepted_guaranteed participant (token: df4600be-e050-4c9c-a8fe-250950227052) - PASSED
B. Invitation page shows 'Garantie en cours' badge for accepted_pending_guarantee participant (token: c86cd8f1-160d-4b28-8c07-34d6b418cf5d) - PASSED
C. Dashboard counters correctly count accepted_guaranteed under 'accepted' (Test Stripe 1: 1 accepté, 0 en attente) - PASSED
D. Dashboard participant badges show ShieldCheck icon for guaranteed participant (Igaal Hanouna) - PASSED
E. AppointmentDetail page shows correct participant statuses (1 accepté(s), 0 en attente) and 'Garanti' badge - PASSED
F. Backend GET /api/invitations/{token} returns guaranteed_at and guarantee_id fields - PASSED
G. Backend participants_status_summary groups accepted_guaranteed under 'accepted' key - PASSED
H. Page refresh preserves correct 'Garanti' status (not reverting to 'En attente') - PASSED
I. Backend POST /api/invitations/{token}/respond validates action and returns proper errors - PASSED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from real Stripe flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe status fix verified. Key test data: 1) Guaranteed participant invitation token: df4600be-e050-4c9c-a8fe-250950227052 (status: accepted_guaranteed), 2) Pending guarantee participant token: c86cd8f1-160d-4b28-8c07-34d6b418cf5d (status: accepted_pending_guarantee), 3) Test appointment: 45005668-7237-4bbc-a5ff-31906a9e18dc (Test Stripe 1). All status badges, counters, and API responses working correctly.

verified_fixes.InvitationPage_getStatusBadge: Now handles 'accepted_guaranteed' (shows 'Garanti' with ShieldCheck) and 'accepted_pending_guarantee' (shows 'Garantie en cours' with CreditCard)
verified_fixes.Backend_GET_invitation: Returns guaranteed_at and guarantee_id fields for guaranteed participants
verified_fixes.Backend_can_cancel: Correctly allows cancellation for accepted_guaranteed status (when deadline not passed)
verified_fixes.Backend_participants_status_summary: Groups accepted, accepted_pending_guarantee, accepted_guaranteed under 'accepted' key
verified_fixes.OrganizerDashboard_getStatusInfo: Shows correct icons (ShieldCheck for guaranteed, CreditCard for pending_guarantee, Clock for invited)
verified_fixes.AppointmentDetail_acceptedCount: Includes accepted_pending_guarantee and accepted_guaranteed in count

mocked_apis.Stripe: Real Stripe TEST mode with live webhook (sk_test_... key configured)
